steps_completed.task: Refactor mock setup: Replace vi.mock('@/lib/api/client') with vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks') returning useCreateMarket, vi.mock('react-router-dom') with useNavigate, vi.mock('@/features/session/context') with useSession. Created defaultMutationState() helper and beforeEach setup.
Verify existing 6 render tests still pass with new mock setup.
Add validation tests: submit disabled when title empty, expiresAt empty, outcome has empty id, outcome has empty name; submit enabled when all fields valid.
Add form interaction tests: title updates preview, add outcome adds third row, remove disabled at 2 outcomes, remove works at 3+ outcomes, ID sanitization.
Add mutation state rendering tests: Creating… text when pending, error message with Error instance, fallback error message for non-Error.
Add submission and navigation tests: mutate called with correct payload, onSuccess navigates to /markets/:id, session undefined when accountId empty.
Run full test suite — all 369 tests across 32 files pass with zero regressions.
